# opti-saas-api Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-01

## Active Technologies

- PostgreSQL (multi-schema tenancy, schema-per-tenant) (002-bulk-stock-receipt)

- TypeScript 5.7 (strict) on Node.js + NestJS 11, TypeORM 0.3.x, class-validator, class-transformer, Swagger (001-warehouse-stock-management)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.7 (strict) on Node.js: Follow standard conventions
